title: Attention As Foundation Of Wisdom
definition: The idea that radical, patient attention to one's environment can lead to profound insights about physics, biology, and time, ultimately culminating in self-realization and liberation.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that radical, patient attention to one's environment can lead to profound insights about physics, biology, and time, ultimately culminating in self-realization and liberation.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The idea that radical, patient attention to one's environment can lead to profound insights about physics, biology, and time, ultimately culminating in self-realization and liberation.
difficulty_levels.expert: The plant as a teacher: the journey from observation to enlightenment through sustained, deep attention.

extra_fields.insight: The plant as a teacher: the journey from observation to enlightenment through sustained, deep attention.
